video_details.title: Ep.2 - Optimizing Your Environment for Success (Jan '23)
video_details.description:
Atomic Habits is a MUST-READ on this topic.

These concepts shouldn't be taken to an extreme, but worth reflecting more heavily on for most people.

(Yes, I know I need a haircut. And don't worry, I listen on 2x speed too.)

00:25-8:55 Do Those Around You Make You Better?
08:55-11:10 Does Your Work Environment Maximize Your Odds of Success?
11:10-13:25 What Environments in '23 Will Elevate You?
13:25-17:00 Can You Build Discipline? And Various Practical Environmental Controls
